title: Man forced to drink acid
description: NATIONAL NEWS - A man and a woman appeared...
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - A man and a woman appeared in the Ladysmith Magistrate’s Court today, facing serious charges of attempted murder.


> The accused individuals are Msizi Mbhele and Nontobeko Portia Ngema, who is also known as ‘Sindi’.


It is alleged that the two attempted to take the life of Sindi’s 26-year-old son last weekend by forcing him to drink acid.

The nature of the duo’s relationship is unclear at this stage. They were apprehended in Ladysmith on Sunday.

Today’s court proceedings saw the case postponed until next Tuesday and Wednesday, where formal bail applications will be addressed.

Read original story on www.citizen.co.za

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
